strengths: Nguyen Duc Huy brings 7 years of academic experience as an AI professor, with strong expertise in NLP, machine learning, and deep learning. He is proficient in Python and PyTorch, and has hands‑on experience with Hugging Face and data engineering fundamentals. His background includes guiding research projects, delivering workshops on text classification and chatbot development, and mentoring students in AI ethics, demonstrating solid pedagogical and collaborative skills. His academic role and research focus align well with the senior instructor level and the requirement for advanced AI training.
weaknesses: The CV does not explicitly mention experience with CNNs, RNNs, or TensorFlow, which are listed as required skills. There is no evidence of industry‑level AI project implementation or startup advisory roles, both of which are preferred. Publications in top conferences such as NIPS, ICML, or CVPR are not documented, and while teaching experience is noted, specific evidence of designing and delivering advanced training programs or updating curricula is lacking.
